text: 🔍 Have a look for your Fitbit
🛒 Poundland on your way home — toilet paper, mould killer, toothbrush. Grab a peach Red Bull if they've got it
🛒 Aldi on the way home — bleach, cheese, potatoes, oats, yoghurt, milk, pasta, red pepper, work meals, baked beans, ready meals
❤️ Don't forget to book a GP appointment about that heart thing last night
